creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
- why do you specify commit hash? You may omit GH_TAGNAME to use tags.
- cairo-dock-plugins fetch is broken: you fetch both distfiles from the same reposiory
- you may strip libgldi.so directly to not change this line on each update
- is there any real reason in overriding DISTNAMEs?
